notes: Core mechanics present (shooting, diving, formation, lives, score) but tractor beam capture logic is buggy, dual-ship mode is broken (dualX offset only 24px, MAX_PLAYER_BULLETS=1 blocks dual firing), entry state doesn't transition cleanly, challenging stage enemies fly off-screen without scoring, and the pause toggle has a logic conflict; visuals are functional but sprites are basic geometric shapes far from authentic Galaga art.
The build is playable but misses key Galaga behaviors and has notable logic flaws, especially pause handling and incomplete/rough capture-dual/challenging-stage implementation.
